titleStmt.title: SII 16.128: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 128. (A.R. No. 682 of 1919.) BOLLAVARAM, hamlet of Proddaṭūru, PRODDATUR TALUK, CUDDAPPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying in the Gōpālasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śōbhakṛit, Nija-Śrā[vaṇa]. The other details are lost. As the gift was made on the occasion of Kṛishṇāshṭamī, the tithi and the date may be equated to 1543, August 23, Wednesday.

It registers the grant of tolls (pēṇṭa-suṅkham) of the village Bollavaram in Guddalūri-sīma by Pāpa Timmayadēva-mahārāju, son of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Timmarāju of lunar race and Ātrēya-gōtra to god Gopikānātha-Perumāḷ for offerings on the occasion of Kṛishṇāshṭami. Guddalūri-sīma is said to be the nāyaṅkara territory of the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ya
śōbhakṛtu saṁvvatsara nija śrā
śrīmatu Akhilāṁḍḍakōṭibrahmāṁḍa
ṁttavēdya purāṇapuruṣōttamuḍaina bolla
perumāḷaku śrīman®mahārājādhirā
ja rā japaramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra sadāsivadēvamahā
rāyalu vijayanagaramaṁddu pṛthivisāmrājyaṁ cēyucu
ṁḍḍaṁgānu śrīman®mahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara Ātriyagōtrakulapavi
tra sōmavaṁśādhīśvarulaina rāmarāju tiṁmmarājugāri ko
māruṁḍu pāpatiṁmmayadēva mahārājulu śrīgōpi
kānātha verumāḷaku Anaṁttamulayina daṁḍḍamulu sama¨rppiṁ
cci sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu māku nāyaṁkkarānaku pāli
ṁccina guddalūri śīmalōni bollavaraṁ grāmaṁ peṁṭṭasuṁkhaṁ
svāmiki rēpaṭi navyedyaṁ kayiṁkkaryānaku kṛṣṇāṣṭami puṇyakāla
maṁddu sahiraṁṇyōdakadhārāpūrvakaṁgānu trivācakaṁgānu
sama¨rpiṁstimigāna Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāIgānu rēpaṭi naivēdyaṁ Avadhariṁcēdi .
svadattaṁ vā paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭi¨rva¨rṣa sahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . yēkaika bhaginī lōkē sa¨rveṣāmēva bhū
bhujāṁ na bhōjyā na karagrāhyā [dēvadattā vasuṁdharā . svadattā]
dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svada
ttaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . śrīkṛṣṇa śrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
